description_long: This is a modern, single-arm chaise lounge upholstered in a smooth, matte blue fabric. The chaise features a broad, rectangular seat cushion with a matching backrest and a single, elongated lumbar pillow for added comfort. The left side of the chaise (from the front view) is bordered by a solid, low-profile armrest, while the right side is open, allowing for easy lounging or reclining. The backrest is straight and moderately high, providing ample support, and the overall silhouette is boxy and minimalist, with clean lines and no visible legs. The upholstery appears to be tightly fitted, with no visible seams, tufting, or decorative elements, giving the piece a sleek, contemporary look. This type of chaise would be suitable for placement in urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, blue upholstered chaise lounge with a single left armrest, straight backrest, and minimalist design. Features a broad seat, lumbar pillow, and clean, boxy lines.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad seat, straight backrest, single left armrest, and a lumbar pillow centered against the backrest.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the open right side with the left armrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, unadorned back and the left armrest extending forward, with no visible legs or decorative features.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizes the straight backrest, the single left armrest, and the layered arrangement of the seat and lumbar cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, moderately high, and rectangular, with a smooth, unadorned surface and no visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: A single, solid armrest is present on the left side only, extending from the seat to the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base appears to be a solid, continuous block that sits directly on the ground, giving a grounded, minimalist appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or surface embellishments.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is one large seat cushion, a straight backrest cushion, and a single elongated lumbar pillow placed against the backrest, all tightly arranged for a clean, modern look.
